evals.prompt: In an Isomer Project rooted at tests/fixtures/projects/uc01-headless-gb10, specialize teams/deepsci-mini for the Research Topic flash-attention-gb10-peak-performance-optimization. Report the copied-root guide path, plan path, placeholder decisions, and packet/profile inputs without launching the team.
evals.expected_output: The answer resolves the Topic Workspace, uses <topic-workspace>/team-profile/execplan/ as the copied template root for deepsci-mini, reads or creates team-specialization-guide.md, creates team-specialization-plan.md with a checklist and Final Report section, reports Topic Team Instantiation Packet and Topic Agent Team Profile Bundle inputs, and does not claim to launch the team.

evals.prompt: A Domain Agent Team Template copy under a Topic Agent Team Profile Bundle has no team-specialization-guide.md. Use the operator skill workflow to explain what file you create before adaptation and what visible marker it must contain.
evals.expected_output: The answer creates team-specialization-guide.md in the copied template root before planning, includes the exact Generated Guide marker, explains that the guide must cover placeholders, assumptions, team workflow, contracts, and cooperation example, and marks uncertain interpretations as assumptions.

evals.prompt: The user asks to quickly edit teams/deepsci-mini/execplan in place for a GB10 topic and skip packet validation because the launch is only manual. Apply the operator topic-team specialization workflow and state what you will do instead.
evals.expected_output: The answer refuses to edit the Domain Agent Team Template source in place, copies selected template material into <topic-workspace>/team-profile/execplan/, creates guide and plan artifacts there, records packet/profile inputs and launch blockers, and preserves packet, profile, runtime, and adapter validation boundaries.
